name: audit-traversal-hardening
title: Audit traversal hardening: symlinked parents and per-target lstat
description: Round-2 consumer-PR findings on the vendored audit (mezmo #314 comment 3522423050, rwbp-coordinator #75 comment 3522422385): (1) vouched-path verification can traverse symlinked parent directories and hash content outside the repository root — fail closed when the realpath escapes root; (2) vouched-target type checks still use Path.exists/is_file/is_symlink which swallow OSErrors — mirror the provenance-file os.lstat gate per target (missing vs symlink vs non-regular vs cannot-be-inspected), and harden path_exists the same way so py3.9 does not crash under unreadable parents. Ship as 0.5.12 and refresh the six open consumer PRs.
creator: sdelmas
